summary: Phase 2 Full Accounting Suite testing complete. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend pages for AR, AP, and Financial Ratios working correctly with all UI components functional.

issues: Profit Margin shows -51.99% (Poor) and Expense Ratio shows 151.99% (Poor) - this is expected behavior as it correctly reflects the current financial state where expenses exceed income

critical_code_review_comments: Accounts Receivable (AR) API correctly handles CRUD operations with summary totals (pending, overdue, collected, outstanding)
AR payment marks invoice as paid and automatically creates cash_book entry for income
Accounts Payable (AP) API includes PRC redemption liability calculation (10 PRC = ₹1)
AP supports multiple payment methods (cash, bank) when marking bills as paid
Bank Reconciliation API returns book_balance, entries, and reconciliation status
GST Tracking supports all valid rates: 0%, 5%, 12%, 18%, 28% with correct gst_amount calculation
GST entry validation correctly rejects invalid rates and types
Budget vs Actual API compares budgeted vs actual expenses by category with variance calculation
Financial Ratios calculates current_ratio, quick_ratio, profit_margin, expense_ratio with status (good/fair/poor)
Health Score formula: base 50 + current_ratio bonus (up to 15) + profit_margin bonus (up to 20) + expense_ratio bonus (up to 15)
Audit Trail API returns paginated audit logs with proper structure
All frontend pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Finance menu in AdminLayout.js correctly includes AR, AP, and Financial Ratios links
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_ prefixed AR invoices, AP bills, and GST entries during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 Full Accounting Suite fully implemented and tested. AR at /admin/accounts-receivable, AP at /admin/accounts-payable, Financial Ratios at /admin/financial-ratios. Backend APIs: GET/POST /api/admin/accounting/receivables, PUT /api/admin/accounting/receivables/{id}/status, GET/POST /api/admin/accounting/payables, PUT /api/admin/accounting/payables/{id}/status, GET /api/admin/accounting/bank-reconciliation, GET/POST /api/admin/accounting/gst-summary, POST /api/admin/accounting/gst-entry, GET/POST /api/admin/accounting/budget, GET /api/admin/accounting/financial-ratios, GET /api/admin/accounting/audit-trail. GST rates: 0, 5, 12, 18, 28%. PRC liability conversion: 10 PRC = ₹1.

Accounts_Receivable.GET_receivables_summary: PASSED - Returns total_pending, total_overdue, total_collected, total_outstanding
Accounts_Receivable.POST_create_receivable: PASSED - Creates invoice with INV- prefix
Accounts_Receivable.PUT_mark_receivable_paid: PASSED - Updates status and creates cash_book entry
Accounts_Receivable.filter_by_status: PASSED - Filters by all, pending, paid work correctly

Accounts_Payable.POST_create_payable: PASSED - Creates bill with BILL- prefix

GST_Tracking.GET_gst_summary: PASSED - Returns input_gst, output_gst, net_gst_payable, gst_by_rate

Budget_vs_Actual.GET_budget_comparison: PASSED - Returns total_budgeted, total_actual, total_variance, budget_utilization
Budget_vs_Actual.POST_set_budget: PASSED - Sets budget categories for month/year
Budget_vs_Actual.comparison_structure: PASSED - Each category has budgeted, actual, variance, status

Financial_Ratios.GET_financial_ratios: PASSED - Returns all ratios with health_score
Financial_Ratios.ratio_structure: PASSED - Each ratio has value, benchmark, status, description
Financial_Ratios.health_score_range: PASSED - Score is 0-100 with valid status
Financial_Ratios.underlying_data: PASSED - Returns total_cash, total_current_liabilities, total_income, total_expenses, net_profit

Audit_Trail.log_structure: PASSED - Logs have timestamp, user_id, action_type, entity_type, description
Audit_Trail.pagination: PASSED - Pagination with page, limit, total, total_pages

Integration.ar_paid_creates_cash_book: PASSED - AR payment creates cash_book income entry

Accounts_Receivable_Page.summary_cards: PASSED - Pending, Overdue, Collected, Total Outstanding cards
Accounts_Receivable_Page.filter_buttons: PASSED - All, Pending, Overdue, Paid filters
Accounts_Receivable_Page.table: PASSED - Invoice, Customer, Description, Amount, Due Date, Status, Action columns

Accounts_Payable_Page.summary_cards: PASSED - Pending, Overdue, Paid, Outstanding, PRC Liability cards
Accounts_Payable_Page.payment_buttons: PASSED - Cash and Bank payment method buttons

Financial_Ratios_Page.underlying_data_section: PASSED - Total Cash, Liabilities, Income, Expenses, Net Profit/Loss

Finance_Menu.ar_link: PASSED - 'Accounts Receivable (AR)' link in Finance menu
Finance_Menu.ap_link: PASSED - 'Accounts Payable (AP)' link in Finance menu
Finance_Menu.ratios_link: PASSED - 'Financial Ratios' link in Finance menu
